en: Hello, I am Nancy.
cn: 你好，我叫 Nancy。

en: I am interested in taking pictures.
cn: 我对摄影感兴趣。

en: The football game is now on the air.
cn: 现在电视台正在播放足球赛。

en: Tom has loved Mary for a long time.
cn: 汤姆爱玛丽很久了。

en: You've got a one-track mind.
cn: 你有个死脑筋。

en: She opened a packet of biscuits.
cn: 她打开了一包饼干。

en: It all seems so strange.
cn: 看起来全都太奇怪了。

en: It is 7:30.
cn: 現在是七點半。

en: There will be a math test tomorrow.
cn: 明天有一個數學測驗。

en: I have life insurance.
cn: 我買了人壽保險。

en: Only a few people understood me.
cn: 只有几个人才明白过来了我的意思。

en: He's a very good teacher, isn't he?
cn: 他是一名很好的老师，对吗？

en: The police will look into the case.
cn: 警察会调查这起案件。

en: You have a way with women.
cn: 你对女人有一套。

en: He became wiser as he grew older.
cn: 随着年龄的增长，他变得更加聪明。

en: The squirrel advanced against the strong wind.
cn: 松鼠在前面頂著強風。

en: Tom lived in Japan for ten years.
cn: 湯姆住在日本十年了。

en: Why are you in my bedroom?
cn: 你為什麼在我的臥室裡？

en: The house is burning.
cn: 這房子正在燃燒著。

en: He has a pleasant voice.
cn: 他的声音很悦耳。

en: Let's take a picture.
cn: 拍照。

en: I must've mistyped the number.
cn: 我一定是打錯號碼了。

en: I think you're boring.
cn: 我認為你很無聊。

en: I didn't know she was married.
cn: 我不知道她结婚了。

en: How did we get here?
cn: 我们怎么来这的？

en: Yanni is reading this book.
cn: 燕妮正在看这本书。

en: Let's drop by his house.
cn: 我們去拜訪他吧。

en: Do you need this book?
cn: 你需要这本书吗？

en: Who wants a piece of cake?
cn: 谁想要来一块蛋糕？

en: She's always in a good mood.
cn: 她總是心情很好。

en: Why doesn't he tell me jokes anymore?
cn: 為甚麼他不再跟我講笑話了？

en: How much is the kilo of bananas?
cn: 一公斤香蕉多少錢?

en: My house looks to the south.
cn: 我的家坐北向南。

en: I can't remember who I gave it to.
cn: 我記不起我把它給了誰。

en: We are against war.
cn: 我们反对战争。

en: I will speak to you tomorrow.
cn: 我明天要和你谈谈。

en: I wish to visit Egypt someday.
cn: 我希望有一天去埃及。

en: My mother almost never complains.
cn: 我媽媽幾乎從不抱怨。

en: All sorts of people live in Tokyo.
cn: 各种人住在东京。

en: Cuba is located in the Americas.
cn: 古巴位於中美洲。

en: Tom won't ever forgive you.
cn: 汤姆永远不会原谅你。

en: He is not the cheerful man he was.
cn: 他已經不再是以前那個快樂的男孩了。

en: Will he get well soon?
cn: 他很快就能痊愈吗？

en: It's a waste of time.
cn: 这是浪费时间。

en: Every day is a sacred day.
cn: 每天都是神聖的一天。

en: My legs are smaller than yours.
cn: 我的腿比你的小。

en: Korean entertainment culture is popular worldwide.
cn: 韓國的娛樂文化在全球都很受歡迎。

en: Beware of thieves.
cn: 注意小偷。

en: I was an honest man until 1985.
cn: 直到1985年前我是一個正直的人。

en: Can you answer this question?
cn: 你能回答這條問題嗎？

en: I hope he comes tomorrow.
cn: 希望他明天會來吧。

en: I've been busy repairing things.
cn: 我一直在忙着修东西。

en: Which one do you prefer?
cn: 哪一个你喜欢一点？

en: I got these earrings from my grandmother.
cn: 這對耳環是祖母送給我的。

en: You don't need millions to be happy.
cn: 快乐不需要数百万的钱。

en: I don't understand Hungarian, sorry.
cn: 我不懂匈牙利语，对不起。

en: He stayed in bed.
cn: 他在床上躺着。

en: Pinocchio, apologize for that, or look out!
cn: 匹诺曹，快道歉，不然就小心！

en: This flower smells sweet.
cn: 這花聞著香甜。

en: I believe in him.
cn: 我相信他。

en: Could you tell me your name and your number?
cn: 你能告诉我你的姓名和手机号码吗？

en: He told his wife not to buy on impulse.
cn: 他叫自己的妻子不要衝動購物。

en: The atomic bomb is the offspring of 20th century physics.
cn: 原子弹是二十世纪物理学的产物。

en: There is a portrait of Bob on the wall.
cn: 墙上有一张鲍勃的肖像画。

en: None of us thought he was to blame for the accident.
cn: 我們都不認為他是事故的罪魁禍首。

en: In my sandwich there is meat, cheese and tomatoes.
cn: 我的三明治里有肉，奶酪和番茄。

en: I talked to him on the telephone yesterday night.
cn: 我昨晚跟他通电话了。

en: By the age of 25, she had lived in five different countries.
cn: 她二十五歲時已經在五個不同的國家住過。

en: Some of the photos have been taken at the risk of life.
cn: 有些相片是冒著生命危險拍的。

en: She should have arrived home by now.
cn: 她现在应该已经到家了。

en: Jane had her hair cut short before the athletic meet.
cn: Jane在运动会之前把头发剃短了。

en: Maria decided to never come back to see him again.
cn: Maria決定再也不要回來看他。

en: I'm too cheap to play anything but homebrew PC games.
cn: 我太小氣了，除了 Homebrew 電腦遊戲，什麼遊戲都不玩。

en: I took off my hat and entered the church.
cn: 我摘下帽子进了教堂。

en: She became rich by virtue of hard work and good business sense.
cn: 她憑著努力和生意頭腦成了富翁。

en: My brother hides his porn magazines under his mattress.
cn: 我的兄弟把色情雜誌藏在床墊下面。

en: Euclid was the author of the first book on mathematics.
cn: 歐幾里得是第一本數學著作的作者。

en: The two scholars wrangled over the meaning of an obscure Tibetan phrase.
cn: 兩位學者為一句意思含糊的藏文句子爭論了一番。

en: They defused the bomb before it could blow up.
cn: 他們趁炸彈還沒有爆炸的時候就把它拆掉了。

en: Yanni took the life of an innocent young man.
cn: Yanni 夺走了一个无辜年轻人的生命。

en: It took a lot of time and money to build the machine.
cn: 這台機器是花了不少時間和金錢才建成的。

en: Compiling a dictionary demands an enormous amount of time.
cn: 編字典是一項極花時間的工作。

en: It was my grandfather that told me that story.
cn: 那个故事是我爷爷告诉我的。

en: He went to Italy for the purpose of studying music.
cn: 他去義大利的目的是學習音樂。

en: Were it not for music, the world would be a dull place.
cn: 如果沒有了音樂，這個世界就會變得十分沉悶。

en: A map helps us to know where we are.
cn: 地图帮助我们知道所在的位置。

en: Could you tell me the way to the station?
cn: 能否告诉我去车站的路怎么走？

en: This boy often breaks our window with his ball.
cn: 這個男孩常常用球打破我們的窗戶。

en: The mail train lost most of its mail in the fire.
cn: 那場火災把郵車上的郵件燒掉了一大半。

en: With your approval, I would like to offer him the job.
cn: 如果您同意, 我想給他這份工作。

en: In Japan, the new school year begins in April.
cn: 日本的新學年在四月開始。

en: A little bit of luck sometimes leads to an unexpected success.
cn: 一點點的運氣有時會導致意想不到的成功。

en: I admit this may not be the best way of doing it.
cn: 我承认这可能不是最好的方法。

en: When I first met her, she was nearly 30 years old.
cn: 我第一次遇到她的时候，她将近三十岁的年纪。

en: Tom doesn't believe a word of what Mary just said.
cn: 瑪莉剛才說的話湯姆一句也不信。

en: I invited him to the party and he accepted.
cn: 我邀请他去派对，他接受了。

en: My mother was too tired, so she went to bed early.
cn: 我的母亲太累了，她早早地去睡了。

en: I am convinced that things will change for the better.
cn: 我深信事情会往更好的方向转变。

en: Everything at that store is 10 percent off the regular price.
cn: 那商店里的商品全都打九折呢。

en: Do you know what time it is in Boston?
cn: 请问现在波士顿是几点钟？

en: There is a book on dancing on the desk.
cn: 桌子上有一本关于舞蹈的书。

en: She was too short to see over the fence.
cn: 她太矮了，看不到围墙外面。

en: It's been three years since I started to study French.
cn: 從我開始學法文，已經過去三年了。

en: These two lines cut across each other at right angles.
cn: 这两条线成直角相交。

en: As a matter of fact, I do speak Spanish.
cn: 事實上，我說西班牙語。

en: Brush your teeth, however sleepy you are.
cn: 無論你多麼想睡, 還是要刷牙。

en: Does the letter need to be written in English?
cn: 這封信需要用英文寫嗎？

en: Do you mind if I turn off the light?
cn: 您介不介意我把灯关了？

en: I was ashamed to go out in old clothes.
cn: 穿旧衣服出门令我感觉颜面扫地。

en: Not knowing what to do, he asked me for help.
cn: 他不知道該怎麼做，於是便找我幫忙。

en: Indeed she is young and beautiful, but she is in delicate health.
cn: 她确实年轻貌美，但她体质娇弱。

en: A true friend would not say such a thing.
cn: 如果真的是朋友的话，是不会说这样的话的吧。

en: My father has the same car as Mr Kimura's.
cn: 我父亲的车和木村先生的一样。

en: Does the tube train stop at the next station?
cn: 地鐵會在下一站停嗎？

en: I don't like to leave things up in the air.
cn: 我不喜歡讓事情懸而未決。

en: Apart from the cost, it will take long to build the bridge.
cn: 撇開費用不說，建這座橋也會耗費不少的時間。

en: Tom does not know the difference between charcoal and carbon.
cn: Tom不知道碳和煤的差別。

en: Sociopaths rarely display remorse or feelings of guilt for their crimes.
cn: 反社会者极少为他们的罪行显露懊悔或有罪恶的感觉。

en: I need a pencil. Can I use one of yours?
cn: 我需要一支铅笔，我能用你的其中一支吗？

en: Do you want me to turn off the lights?
cn: 你要我关灯吗？

en: The patient, despite having taken the new medication, didn't feel any better.
cn: 病人吃了新药后没觉得好些了。

en: That company hires people without regard to race, religion, or nationality.
cn: 这家公司不分种族、宗教或国籍雇用人。

en: Norway, located in Northern Europe, is a highly developed country.
cn: 挪威位於北歐，是個高度發展的國家。

en: Hey, I may have no money, but I still have my pride.
cn: 嗨，我可能没钱，但我一直有我的骄傲。

en: Perseverance, as you know, is the key to success.
cn: 就像你们知道的那样，毅力是成功的关键。

en: Christmas gingerbread, also called honey cake, is a traditional German dessert.
cn: 圣诞姜饼/蜂蜜饼是一种传统的德国点心

en: London, the capital of England, is on the Thames.
cn: 英国首都伦敦在泰晤士河畔。

en: The Yangtze, at 6,380 km, is Asia's longest river.
cn: 长江是亚洲的最长江，6380公里。

en: She's beautiful, smart, and - most importantly - has a good heart.
cn: 她很漂亮，聪明，并且最重要的是，她有一颗善良的心。

en: Which do you like best, apples, oranges or grapes?
cn: 你最喜歡蘋果、橘子還是葡萄？

en: Potassium, heated with a Bunsen burner, gives the flame a lilac color.
cn: 用本生燈加熱鉀，火焰就會呈現淡紫色。

en: If I could send you a marshmallow, Trang, I would.
cn: Trang，如果我能寄给你一个棉花糖，我会这么做的。

en: The store sells foodstuffs, such as butter, cheese, and sugar.
cn: 這家店賣的是牛油、奶酪、砂糖之類的食品。

en: One, two, three, four, five, six, seven, eight, nine, ten.
cn: 一、二、三、四、五、六、七、八、九、十。

en: Tom, if you're not going, I'm not going either.
cn: 湯姆，要是你不去，我也不去。

en: Hey, Tom, can we get two bins of lettuce?
cn: 嘿，湯姆，我們可以買兩箱生菜嗎？

en: You have a choice of black tea, coffee, or milk.
cn: 你可以选择红茶，咖啡或牛奶。

en: At this language centre, about 15 international languages are taught, including English.
cn: 在這個語言中心，教授約15種國際語言，包括英語。

en: Switzerland is situated between France, Italy, Austria and Germany.
cn: 瑞士位于法国、意大利、奥地利和德国之间。

en: Turn north, walk to the second alley, and you're there.
cn: 往北拐弯走到第二条弄堂就是。

en: So, was there a time when you were a wizard, too?
cn: 所以, 有段時間你也是個巫師嗎?

en: Tableland vegetables are grown here, such as lettuce, cabbage, and celery.
cn: 這裡種植有生菜、高麗菜和芹菜等高原蔬菜。

en: We have pilaf, lo mein, and kebabs in our restaurant.
cn: 在我们的饭店抓饭，拌面，烤肉串都有。

en: His salary is high, and the hours are pretty good, too.
cn: 他的工作工资很高，工作时间也相当理想。

en: Currently, I'm looking for a job in customer service, preferably retail.
cn: 目前，我正在尋找客服工作，最好是零售業。

en: We have two dogs, three cats, and six chickens.
cn: 我们养了两只狗、三只猫和六只鸡。

en: She was a tall, thin girl with long, soft brown hair.
cn: 她是個又高又瘦, 留著一頭又長又軟的褐色頭髮的女孩。

en: In fact, there are countless, varied uses for the Internet.
cn: 实际上，网络的作用有着无数的多种多样的。

en: There are some misprints, but all in all, it's a good book.
cn: 雖然有一些印刷錯誤, 但大致上說來, 這是一本好書。

en: It was cold, and in addition, it was windy.
cn: 天氣很冷，而且風很大。

en: From reading good books we can derive pleasure, friendship, experience and instruction.
cn: 读书，可以获得乐趣、友谊、经验和指导。

en: Hey, sir, the function on the blackboard is not exponential, but trigonometric.
cn: 老師，黑板上的函數不是指數函數，是三角函數。

en: On gift-giving occasions, people generally avoid giving money, but there are exceptions.
cn: 人們送禮通常都不會送錢，但是也會有例外的情況。

en: Newspapers, magazines, and newscasts tell what is going on in the world.
cn: 报纸、杂志和新闻广播讲述着世界上正在发生的事。

en: Tom, who had been working all day, wanted to have a rest.
cn: 工作了一整天的汤姆想要休息一下。

en: Bill, if you'll come with me, you'll float, too.
cn: 比爾，如果你跟我來，你也會飄。

en: Wan-chun’s a total drama addict — Korean, American, she watches them all.
cn: 婉君超愛追劇，韓劇、美劇她都看。

en: In 1900, he left England, and he never returned.
cn: 1900年他离开英格兰后，就没有再回来。

en: Red, as opposed to green, is a sign of danger.
cn: 紅色，相對於綠色，是危險的標誌。

en: I, as well as you, was late for school yesterday.
cn: 我跟你一样昨天上学迟到了。

en: It is justice, not charity, that is wanting in the world.
cn: 世界需要的是公正，不是施舍。

en: A bad habit, once formed, is difficult to get rid of.
cn: 一旦養成了壞習慣，就很難改回來了。

en: When angry, count ten; when very angry, a hundred.
cn: 生氣的時候，由一數到十；若氣得不得了，就數到一百。

en: He was, is, and will be, my best friend.
cn: 他以前是我最好的朋友，他現在是我最好的朋友，他以後也會是我最好的朋友。

en: Washington, D.C., is the capital of the United States of America.
cn: 美国的首都是华盛顿。

en: I have coffee, tea, water, and fresh fruit juice.
cn: 我有咖啡、茶、水跟新鮮果汁。

en: In this soup there are carrots, onions, parsley, celery and potatoes.
cn: 這個湯裏有胡蘿蔔、洋蔥、歐芹、芹菜和土豆。

en: In its home country, France, Tatoeba became a social and cultural phenomenon.
cn: 在其本國，法國，Tatoeba成為一種社會文化現象。

en: The weekdays are: Monday, Tuesday, Wednesday, Thursday, and Friday.
cn: 工作日是：周一，周二，周三，周四，和周五。

en: Xiao Yu, this is Juan, and I am Juan's friend.
cn: 小雨，他是胡安，我和胡安是朋友。

en: The major religions in China are Taoism, Buddhism, Islam and Christianity.
cn: 中国重要的宗教是道教、佛教、伊斯兰教和基督教。

en: If it isn't a bad, dirty, or wrong thing, then it's alright.
cn: 不是坏事，不是丑事，不是错事，确认了这三点就没事。

en: There is little, if any, hope of his being alive.
cn: 我们几乎不抱他还活着的希望。

en: So we love sentences. But, even more, we love languages.
cn: 所以我们喜欢句子。更进一步来说，我们喜欢语言。

en: When I hear this song, I think of you, and miss you.
cn: 當我聽到這首歌，我想起了你，並想念著你。

en: Tom might be here by 2:30, but then, maybe not.
cn: tom 两点半可能会到，不过，也可能不会

en: We don't like our neighbors, and they don't like us, either.
cn: 我們不喜歡我們的鄰居，而他們也不喜歡我們。

en: Mr Johnson, president of the club, will soon come.
cn: 俱乐部会长Johnson先生很快就要来了。

en: She is beautiful, intelligent and, what is best of all, very kind-hearted.
cn: 她又漂亮，又聰明，而最棒的是，她還是一個十分善良的人。

en: The lakes and rivers, too, are full of fish.
cn: 湖和河里全是鱼。
